_comment: Q&A groundedness bank (Phase 6). expected_behavior in {GROUNDED_ANSWER, ABSTRACT_ONLY_GUARD, REFUSE_NO_EVIDENCE}. Questions target the ingested corpus; grading checks every claim traces to retrieved passages (deterministic citation backstop + LLM judge).

questions.question: What mechanisms of resistance to KRAS G12D inhibitors in pancreatic cancer were reported, and how might they be overcome?
questions.notes: Should draw on the HRS-4642/UPR and WFS1/MRTX1133 resistance papers; every claim must trace to a retrieved abstract and cite its DOI.

questions.question: What recent MYC-related mechanisms were described in pancreatic cancer?
questions.notes: e.g. MYC/USP39/SRSF1, MED30 at 8q24; answer only from passages, cited.

questions.question: Summarize recent findings on cancer-associated fibroblasts or the extracellular matrix in PDAC.
questions.notes: CAF/ECM papers; claims cited and grounded.

questions.question: What early-detection or biomarker approaches for pancreatic cancer were reported recently?
What was reported about replication stress and immune responses in pancreatic cancer?
questions.notes: DPY30 replication-stress / immunoediting work; grounded + cited.

questions.question: What were the exact patient sample sizes, sequencing platform, and statistical tests used in the DPY30 replication-stress study?
questions.notes: Methodological detail not present in any abstract; must say the full text isn't available and summarize only what the abstract states, without fabricating.

questions.question: Give the precise IC50 values and antibody catalog numbers used in the nimotuzumab + KRAS G12D inhibitor combination experiments.
questions.notes: Reagent/quantitative detail not in abstracts; must decline and not invent numbers.

questions.question: What's new on EGFR-mutant lung adenocarcinoma targeted therapy?
questions.notes: Corpus is PDAC-only; retrieved passages won't address lung cancer — the assistant must say it can't answer from the corpus rather than use outside knowledge.
